---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{python}
import ibis
from ibis import _
```


```{python}
duck = ibis.duckdb.connect()
```

```{python}
%%time
min_obs = 1000

crsp_daily = duck.read_parquet(
    "crsp_daily.parquet", 
    table_name="crsp_daily")
    
factors_ff3_daily = duck.read_parquet(
    "factors_ff3_daily.parquet",
    table_name="factors_ff3_daily",
)

daily = (
    crsp_daily
    .select("permno", "date", "ret_excess")
    .join(
        factors_ff3_daily.select(
            "date",
            mkt_excess=(
                _["mktrf"].cast("float64") - _["rf"].cast("float64")
            ),
        ),
        "date",
    )
    .mutate(month=_.date.truncate("M"))
)

w_beta = ibis.trailing_range_window(
    ibis.interval(months=59),
    group_by=_.permno,
    order_by=_.month,
)

w_month = ibis.window(
    group_by=[_.permno, _.month]
)

betas_duckdb = (
    daily
    .mutate(
        beta=(
            _.mkt_excess.cov(_.ret_excess, how="sample").over(w_beta)
            / _.mkt_excess.var(how="sample").over(w_beta)
        ),
        mean_ret=_.ret_excess.mean().over(w_beta),
        mean_mkt=_.mkt_excess.mean().over(w_beta),
        n=_.permno.count().over(w_beta),
        first_month_date=_.date.min().over(w_month),
    )
    .filter(_.date == _.first_month_date, _.n >= min_obs)
    .select(
        "permno",
        "month",
        "beta",
        "n",
        alpha=_.mean_ret - _.beta * _.mean_mkt,
    )
    .rename(date="month")
    .order_by("permno", "date")
)
```

And here are the resulting betas:

```{python}
betas_duckdb.compile()
```

```{python}
%%time
min_obs = 1000

crsp_daily = duck.read_parquet(
    "crsp_daily.parquet", 
    table_name="crsp_daily")
    
factors_ff3_daily = duck.read_parquet(
    "factors_ff3_daily.parquet",
    table_name="factors_ff3_daily",
)

daily = (
    crsp_daily
    .select("permno", "date", "ret_excess")
    .join(
        factors_ff3_daily.select(
            "date",
            mkt_excess=(
                _["mktrf"].cast("float64") - _["rf"].cast("float64")
            ),
        ),
        "date",
    )
    .mutate(month=_.date.truncate("M"))
)

w_beta = ibis.trailing_range_window(
    ibis.interval(months=59),
    group_by=_.permno,
    order_by=_.month,
)

w_month = ibis.window(
    group_by=[_.permno, _.month]
)

betas_duckdb = (
    daily
    .mutate(
        beta=(
            _.mkt_excess.cov(_.ret_excess, how="sample").over(w_beta)
            / _.mkt_excess.var(how="sample").over(w_beta)
        ),
        mean_ret=_.ret_excess.mean().over(w_beta),
        mean_mkt=_.mkt_excess.mean().over(w_beta),
        n=_.permno.count().over(w_beta),
        first_month_date=_.date.min().over(w_month),
    )
    .filter(_.date == _.first_month_date, _.n >= min_obs)
    .select(
        "permno",
        "month",
        "beta",
        "n",
        alpha=_.mean_ret - _.beta * _.mean_mkt,
    )
    .rename(date="month")
    .order_by("permno", "date")
)
```

And here are the resulting betas:

```{python}
betas_duckdb.compile()
```

```{python}
%%time
import polars as pl

con = ibis.polars.connect()

crsp_daily = con.read_parquet(
    "crsp_daily.parquet", 
    table_name="crsp_daily")
    
factors_ff3_daily = con.read_parquet(
    "factors_ff3_daily.parquet",
    table_name="factors_ff3_daily",
)
```


```{python}
daily = (
    crsp_daily
    .select("permno", "date", "ret_excess")
    .join(
        factors_ff3_daily.select(
            "date",
            mkt_excess=(
                _["mktrf"].cast("float64") - _["rf"].cast("float64")
            ),
        ),
        "date",
    )
    .mutate(month=_.date.truncate("M"))
)

w_beta = ibis.trailing_range_window(
    ibis.interval(months=59),
    group_by=_.permno,
    order_by=_.month,
)

w_month = ibis.window(
    group_by=[_.permno, _.month]
)

betas_duckdb = (
    daily
    .mutate(
        beta=(
            _.mkt_excess.cov(_.ret_excess, how="sample").over(w_beta)
            / _.mkt_excess.var(how="sample").over(w_beta)
        ),
        mean_ret=_.ret_excess.mean().over(w_beta),
        mean_mkt=_.mkt_excess.mean().over(w_beta),
        n=_.permno.count().over(w_beta),
        first_month_date=_.date.min().over(w_month),
    )
    .filter(_.date == _.first_month_date, _.n >= min_obs)
    .select(
        "permno",
        "month",
        "beta",
        "n",
        alpha=_.mean_ret - _.beta * _.mean_mkt,
    )
    .rename(date="month")
    .order_by("permno", "date")
)
```

```{python}
#| eval: false
betas_duckdb.compile()
```
